title: Sector engagement plan collection claim opened
body: Opened claim 520afc14-294c-4df3-9c41-f429350e53de for a sector-engagement planning taxonomy pass. Scope: create .agent/plans/sector-engagement, rehome the existing external planning material, move the Finnish external-pipeline demonstration brief, add an OEAI sub-thread review, and update affected plan/docs links. Active-claim scan found Verdant Regrowing Pollen on TS6 migration paths only; no overlap with this taxonomy bundle beyond shared .agent coordination surfaces.
